briefdescription.para: This function is the main entry point for the interrupt example using the XDpRxSs driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function will setup the system with interrupts handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the system setup failed.
XST_SUCCESS should never return since this function, if setup was successful, is blocking.

simplesect.para: If system setup was successful, this function is blocking in order to illustrate interrupt handling taking place for different types interrupts. Refer xdprxss.h file for more info.

briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform specific peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Video Phy.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video Phy configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if DP RX Subsystem configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPRX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a video mode change interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the power state interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a vertical blank interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a training lost interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when an info packet interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when arrival of external (audio) packet interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the training done interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a bandwidth change interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a down request interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a down reply interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when an audio overflow interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a payload allocation interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when an ACT sequence interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a CRC test start interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the unplug event occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the link bandwidth change occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for PLL reset request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for XDpRxSs interrupt example.

detaileddescription.para: If the DpRxSs_IntrExample function which setup the system succeeds, this function will wait for the interrupts.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the interrupt example was unsuccessful.

simplesect.para: Unless setup failed, main will never return since DpRxSs_IntrExample is blocking (it is waiting on interrupts).

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the XDpRxSs driver in single stream (SST) transport or multi-stream transport (MST) mode with interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: Upon unplug event (DisplayPort cable is unplugged/plugged), DisplayPort RX Subsystem will program DP159 disconnect sequence or DP159 training pattern 1, 2, 3 sequences respectively.

simplesect.para: This example requires an interrupt controller connected to the processor and the DisplayPort RX Subsystem HIP is in the system. For this example to display output, the user need to implement initialization of the system (DpRxSs_PlatformInit), Video Phy (DpRxSs_VideoPhyInit), start DisplayPort RX subsystem (XDpRxSs_Start) and DisplayPort RX Subsystem setup (DpRxSs_Setup). The input to the Subsystem is from RX (GT). The functions DpRxSs_PlatformInit, DpRxSs_VideoPhyInit and DpRxSs_Setup are declared and are left up to the user to implement.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/29/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 10/05/15 Changed DpTxSs_Setup > DpRxSs_Setup. Removed HDCP callbacks registration and callbacks. Added HDCP and Timer Counter interrupt handler setup. 4.00 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028.
